tip.upload: Upload the test result file of dnspy, and analyze it on the website
tip.please_upload_file: Please upload a json result file, the file name is like dnspy_result_2024-11-07-17-32-13.json. Or click the sample button to use sample data
tip.data_loaded_desc: Click on the bar of the data to copy the server address
tip.data_load_failed_desc: Please check if the file format is correct

score.desc_scores: Total score high, the better the overall performance. Click on the bar of the data to copy the server address.
score.desc_latencies: Average latency(ms) low, the faster the query result returns. Click on the bar of the data to copy the server address. (Note: If the delay time is too small also consider whether it has been hijacked by the operator)
score.desc_successRates: Success rate(%) high, the higher the success rate. Click on the bar of the data to copy the server address.
score.desc_qps: QPS(Queries Per Second) high, the faster the query speed. Click on the bar of the data to copy the server address.

gui.title: DNS Benchmark
gui.subtitle: Test DNS server performance from your network
gui.use_builtin_servers_desc: Test against hundreds of worldwide DNS servers
gui.custom_servers_desc: One server per line. Supports IP, hostname, DoH, DoT, DoQ
gui.no_aaaa_desc: Do not test AAAA record resolution
gui.not_running: Configure and start a benchmark to see results
gui.benchmark_done: Benchmark complete! {{count}} servers tested. Switch to the Analyze tab to explore results.
gui.benchmark_complete_desc: Results are ready. Switch to Analyze tab to explore.
